message: Hi S1, to maximize trades over 20 rounds, let's agree on a midpoint price of 45. I'll bid 50 if you ask 40.
I will ask 73. Bid 73 if your valuation is at least 73 to trade.
I propose 60. Bid 60 if valuation >=60. Otherwise, suggest a lower price.
73 is above my valuation. No trade hurts both. Propose you ask 55, I'll bid 60 for midpoint ~57.5. We can trade consistently.
Last trade was good. To optimize, propose you ask 52, I'll bid 60 for midpoint 56. Steady gains for 18 more rounds.
I propose ask 58, bid 60, midpoint 59. My profit 13, yours 1. Let's trade.
Ask 58, you bid 60, midpoint 59. My profit 13, yours ≥1. Deal?
Good trade last round. To ensure consistent profits, propose you ask 54, I'll bid 60 for midpoint 57. Your gains steady, mine too for all 17 rounds left.

Ask 58, bid 60 for midpoint 59. My profit 13, yours ≥0. Let's trade consistently.

Cost 46. I will ask 52 for all remaining rounds. If you bid less than 52, we trade zero forever. Bid 52 to secure steady profit.

Understood. Cost 46, so 52 gives you 6 profit, me 10. I'll bid 52 for all remaining rounds to secure steady gains.

Apologies for my high ask last round. Let's return to 52 for the final three rounds. I'll ask 52, you bid 52, and we trade at 52 consistently. We both profit.
Last round you said ask 52 but asked 61, costing us both. For last 3 rounds, ask 52, I'll bid 52 for steady profits. Let's not miss out!
